message:
chore(release): bump version to 0.4.0

This release adds 4 new tools to the flywheel ecosystem:
- destructive_command_guard (dcg) - Tool #9: Claude Code hook blocking dangerous git/fs commands
- repo_updater (ru) - Tool #10: Multi-repo sync + AI-driven commit automation
- giil - Utility: Download cloud images for visual debugging in SSH
- csctf - Utility: Convert AI chat share links to Markdown/HTML archives

The stack now includes 10 core tools plus utilities.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
